title: Defence Minister Melnis won't stand in Saeima elections
summary_full: Recently-installed Defence Minister Raivis Melnis will not be standing in the upcoming Saeima elections on October 3rd, he confirmed to Latvian Radio on July 1st.
summary_public: Recently-installed Defence Minister Raivis Melnis will not be standing in the upcoming Saeima elections on October 3rd, he confirmed to Latvian Radio on July 1st.

LV.label: neutral
LV.evidence: Defence Minister Raivis Melnis will not be standing in the upcoming Saeima elections
